weights.description: Points added when instruction-override language patterns are detected but did not already trigger a block rule.
Points added for role-play / persona-swap framing.
Points added for encoding/obfuscation signals (Base64-like blocks, unusual unicode density).
Points added when text entropy exceeds the entropy_threshold, suggesting obfuscated content.
Shannon entropy (bits/char) above which text is considered abnormally random.
Points added for unusually long prompts, a mild signal used only in combination with others.
Scores at or above this value are marked Suspicious and routed to the LLM judge if enabled.
Scores at or above this value are marked Blocked outright.
